title: Spicy Korean Cauliflower Bowl
description: A spicy and flavorful cauliflower bowl inspired by Korean cuisine, perfect for a quick and nutritious meal.
instructions: 2. Rinse the cauliflower and break it into florets. Place on a baking sheet and drizzle with 1 tsp of sesame oil. Roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes or until tender.
3. In a large skillet, heat 1 tsp of sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add the ginger and cook for 1-2 minutes or until fragrant.
4. Add the korean chili flakes and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Add the soy sauce and brown sugar to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
6. Add the roasted cauliflower to the skillet and toss to coat with the spicy sauce.
7. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the cauliflower is well coated.
8. Stir in the rice vinegar and toasted sesame seeds.
9. Transfer the cauliflower to a bowl and top with green onions.
